data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduce complexity and decision time by limiting the number of choices.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizing user interaction by focusing on larger control areas.
data.technical_spec: Clickable Product Images, Large Call to Action Buttons

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Ensuring users can comprehend information presented by breaking it into chunks.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focusing on core tasks that deliver the majority of results.
data.technical_spec: Prioritization of Bestsellers, Fast Checkout Process

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Creating memorable user interactions by prioritizing 'peak' moments.
